ai_suggestion: Embrace Monaco's effortless Riviera chic in this warm 31°C weather by wearing a breathable white linen button-down paired with tailored beige cotton shorts, or a flowing silk midi dress. Complement your look and shield yourself from the Mediterranean sun with oversized designer sunglasses, a classic woven straw fedora, and sophisticated leather loafers or sandals. Since the gentle breeze offers minimal cooling against today's high heat, remember to stay hydrated, apply sunscreen, and enjoy your outdoor strolls in style.
